context: Tests whether the agent keeps metadata guidance inside App Review compliance boundaries while routing ASO strategy to the sibling skill domain.

checklist.name: ASO boundary
checklist.description: States that keyword research, ranking strategy, conversion optimization, screenshot ordering, and A/B testing belong in an ASO strategy pass rather than App Review compliance.

checklist.name: Metadata accuracy
checklist.description: Gives App Review metadata guardrails: accurate app name/subtitle/keywords/description, screenshots showing real UI, no misleading or unavailable features, no prices in description, and no competitor names or irrelevant keywords.

checklist.name: Field limits
checklist.description: Mentions the 30-character app name limit, 30-character subtitle limit, and 100-character keyword field limit with comma-separated keywords and no spaces after commas.

checklist.name: Screenshot compliance
checklist.description: Mentions current screenshot-size compliance, including 6.9-inch iPhone screenshots and 13-inch iPad screenshots when applicable.

checklist.name: No keyword plan
checklist.description: Does not provide a full keyword strategy, search-volume analysis, screenshot-caption rewrite, or marketing-copy plan.
